channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: One Arrested After High-Speed Carjacking and Chase in KuGompo City
item.description: Law enforcement officials are currently managing a serious incident in Berea, KuGompo City (formerly East London), after an alleged carjacking earlier on Thursday afternoon. Eyewitnesses reported a hi...

item.title: Donu Kogbara Critiques Tinubu Supporters’ Blind Loyalty and UK Visit Hype
item.description: In this opinion piece, Nigerian columnist Donu Kogbara takes on President Bola Ahmed Tinubu’s most passionate supporters, whom she calls the 'BATified Brigade'. According to her, these supporters refu...

item.title: Bobrovsky records shutout as Panthers defeat Oilers 4-0
item.description: EDMONTON – The Florida Panthers defeated the Edmonton Oilers 4-0 on Thursday, continuing their dominance over Edmonton in recent matchups. Goaltender Sergei Bobrovsky made 21 saves, earning his fourth...

item.title: Global tensions mount as US-Iran conflict disrupts energy markets and sparks fuel crisis in Australia
item.description: Global tensions continue to surge as the war between the United States, Israel, and Iran intensifies across the Middle East. An Israeli airstrike in southern Lebanon wounded a journalist and a cameram...

item.title: Army Chief Warns Against Domestic Unrest Triggered by Foreign Events
item.description: Field Marshal Asim Munir, Pakistan’s Chief of Army Staff and Chief of Defence Forces, has cautioned religious leaders that violent reactions inside the country to incidents occurring abroad will not b...

item.title: Congress Finalises Kerala Candidates with Sudhakaran Opting Out of Contest
item.description: The Congress party has ended days of uncertainty by releasing its second list of 37 candidates for the Kerala assembly polls on Thursday, completing the selection for all 95 seats it plans to contest....

item.title: Early detection of cerebral palsy improves children’s development outcomes, say experts
item.description: Health experts in Tanzania are calling on parents and caregivers to pay close attention to early developmental signs in young children to help detect cerebral palsy (CP) as early as possible. Cerebral...

item.title: HDFC Bank Chairman Atanu Chakraborty Resigns Abruptly; Investors Seek Clarity
item.description: On Wednesday night, HDFC Bank chairman Atanu Chakraborty resigned unexpectedly, citing discrepancies between his personal values and certain practices within the bank. This sudden move left investors ...

item.title: Daylight saving ends 5 April 2026: how clocks change and what it means for Australians
item.description: Daylight saving will end early on Sunday 5 April 2026 at 3am Australian eastern daylight time (AEDT) in New South Wales, Victoria, South Australia, Tasmania and the Australian Capital Territory. At th...

item.title: Alex Eala Reflects on Growth After Miami Victory
item.description: Filipino tennis sensation Alex Eala recently celebrated a significant victory in Miami, and in a heartfelt interview, she shared her reflections on the process. Eala emphasized the importance of patie...

item.title: PTI leaders, family denied meeting with Imran Khan at Adiala Jail; CM Afridi appeals for Eid visit
item.description: In a concerning development, leaders of Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) were once again denied permission to meet their party founder, former Prime Minister Imran Khan, at Adiala Jail. Advocate Niazull...

item.title: TMC booth chief found murdered in North 24 Parganas, Bengal
item.description: In a tragic incident at Minakhan in North 24 Parganas, West Bengal, a 38-year-old Trinamool Congress (TMC) booth chief, Kazi Masiur Rahman, was discovered dead on Thursday. His body, showing signs of ...

item.title: Gulf Countries Urge Iran to Stop Attacks and Respect International Law
item.description: A high-level ministerial meeting hosted by Saudi Arabia on March 19, 2026, strongly urged Iran to immediately and unconditionally halt its attacks against Gulf countries, amid escalating conflict foll...

item.title: Israel Halts Attacks on Iranian Energy Infrastructure Following U.S. Rebuke
item.description: Israel announced it will cease targeting Iranian energy infrastructure after an Israeli strike on a gas field prompted retaliatory attacks across the Middle East, spiking oil and gas prices. The move ...

item.title: Nicola Sturgeon delivers emotional farewell speech after 27 years in Scottish politics

item.title: Pakistan Customs Seize Over 300 Smuggled Mobile Phones at Khunjerab Pass
item.description: In Gilgit, Pakistan Customs, along with Military Intelligence and local police, successfully foiled an attempt to smuggle high-end mobile phones from China via Khunjerab Pass. During the operation, au...

item.title: Israel escalates strikes on Iran amid US pressure and regional tensions
item.description: Israel launched a new wave of attacks on Iranian targets, specifically the South Pars gas field, despite US president Donald Trump requesting that such strikes be avoided. Israeli Prime Minister Benja...
